subject: Acerola, a young Alolan trainer in a purple dress, standing with one arm extended in a welcoming or summoning gesture
description: A young humanoid figure stands in a light outdoor setting, wearing a short purple dress and purple hair styled in twin sections. She extends one arm outward with fingers spread in a beckoning or directing gesture. Her expression is cheerful and open. The background is soft and mostly white-cream, suggesting an interior or bright outdoor space. The composition is a mid-shot showing the full figure from roughly knee height up.
foreground: young female-presenting figure in purple dress with arm extended outward
emotion: cheerful, open, welcoming gesture with outstretched arm
